archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Customized with Navy Blue for Wealth Management)
design_philosophy: A blend of 'Old Money Tech' and modern Swiss precision. We use warm, off-white backgrounds to build trust, paired with deep navy blue for authority. Headings use an elegant serif to convey established wealth and expertise, while the body uses a clean, sterile sans-serif for financial clarity.

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. Use py-24 or py-32 for major sections.
layout.border_radius: Rounded-none or rounded-sm for a sharp, authoritative corporate look.

instructions_to_main_agent.global: Ensure Cormorant Garamond is imported for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts. Use lucide-react for icons. ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent.nav: Sticky header (z-50) using the 'Crystal Glass' approach: backdrop-blur-xl, bg-[#FAF9F6]/80, with a delicate bottom border-white/40. Logo on the left, primary navigation in the center, and a solid navy 'Consult With Us' button on the right.
instructions_to_main_agent.hero: Asymmetric layout. Left side: Massive H1 'Preserving Wealth, Optimizing Tax.' with a slightly indented paragraph explaining their Kolkata roots and 10+ years expertise. Right side: Use the 'hero_architecture' image softly masked or framed within a tall, elegant rectangular container. Overall background is primary #FAF9F6.
instructions_to_main_agent.about: Split layout with massive negative space. Use a giant '10+' typographic element in the background or side. Highlight 'Team of CAs & MBAs'. Use the 'about_professionals' image with a subtle offset drop-shadow or a 1px border. Background: secondary #F3F0EA.
instructions_to_main_agent.services: Implement the 'Grid Borders' (Technical) look. A CSS grid (md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3) where each service block has `border-r border-b border-[#0B1B3D]/10`. The 5 services: Wealth Management, Tax Consulting & Planning, Financial Advisory, GST & Compliance, Investment Planning. Leave the 6th block empty or use it as a CTA. Hover effect: subtle background tint shift.
instructions_to_main_agent.team: Minimalist representation. Instead of individual cards if no avatars exist, use the 'team_meeting' image spanning wide, with overlapping text boxes describing the core leadership (CAs & MBAs).
instructions_to_main_agent.blog_insights: A 3-column clean layout for recent insights. Use dummy titles like 'Navigating GST Changes in 2026', 'Wealth Preservation for HNWIs', 'Corporate Tax Planning'. Minimalist borders, no heavy shadows.
instructions_to_main_agent.contact: Dark mode section to create a strong footer anchor. Background: #0B1B3D (Navy). Text: #FAF9F6. Left side: Contact details (Email: Connect@unovia.in, M: 7278671467, Location: Kolkata). Right side: Functional Shadcn form (Name, Email, Service Interest, Message). Form inputs should have a transparent background with white bottom borders, or clean white boxes.
